name_en: Iran's Permanent Mission to the United Nations (New York)
name_fa: نمایندگی دائمی ایران نزد سازمان ملل متحد
description: Iran's Permanent Mission to the United Nations in New York represents the Islamic Republic in the UN General Assembly and Security Council proceedings. It serves as a formal channel for Iran's diplomatic engagement with the international community on issues including sanctions, nuclear negotiations, and regional conflicts. In April 2026, the United States expelled a senior Iranian diplomat — the fourth-ranking official at the mission — on security grounds, citing undisclosed concerns about activities incompatible with diplomatic status, continuing a pattern of US expulsions of Iranian UN mission personnel.

sources.title: Permanent Mission of Iran to the United Nations — Wikipedia

editorial_notes: US expelled a No. 4 diplomat from this mission in April 2026 on security grounds.
